mission.lead: WSUA mobilizes communities across the Western United States to support Ukraine through humanitarian aid, legal research, and energy independence for rural communities. We work to protect the rights of displaced Ukrainians, strengthen accountability efforts, and build the foundations for long-term recovery and restitution.
mission.trustLine: Pursuing 501(c)(3) status - Transparent reporting - EIN 41-359-3491 - UBI 606-029-374

updates.title: Major Updates
updates.intro: Key milestones, announcements, and major WSUA developments.

cards.title: WSUA Coffee Collection Integrated
cards.body: Our coffee page now links directly to each Charity Roasters product so supporters can go from story to checkout in one click.

cards.title: Program Pages Expanded
cards.body: Core program pages have been refreshed to better explain humanitarian aid, legal research, and energy independence initiatives.

cards.title: Legal Resource Access Improved
cards.body: Research, claims guidance, and document library navigation has been streamlined to make information easier to find.
